戚今诺穿书了，成了末世文中，疯批男主那嫌贫爱富的恶毒初恋。
当初嫌弃男主穷一脚踹开，等男主变成首都巨富大少爷，又厚着脸皮求复合。
惨遭拒绝后给男主下药，男主反抗砸了男主脑袋，霸王硬上弓。
等戚今诺醒来，已经跟男主生米煮成熟饭了。
想到女配的悲惨结局，戚今诺瑟瑟发抖，结果男主醒来，居然问她是谁。
戚今诺：？？？
她哄骗：“我是你女朋友呀，怎么睡一觉不认识我啦？”
从此抱上粗大腿，有了空间，一路升级打怪，甜甜蜜蜜。
直到有一天，男主恢复记忆，戚今诺连夜跑路。
男主气红了眼，将她抓回来按在床上狠狠蹂躏，冷声问：“还跑吗？”
戚今诺呜呜直哭：“老公，我不跑了，再也不跑了！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f1fd1db87094990ec39dd8e23339fd19","author":"暴烈月光","author_id":"","book_id":"7350313313625984062","book_name":"骗了末世失忆男主后我被宠上天","book_short_name":"末世轮回书","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7350313508547871294","read_count":"40731","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"660232"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"322","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,空间,末世,穿书,囤物资","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/68088678c224a665e0c4135fb40ebe6c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779433064&x-signature=FY3lfYa%2FAEFpn%2FEQXLik%2FKqARdc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"62454943671","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"83"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231457449C932CDDD68EC2952EC8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,"forwarded_count":0 中后期男主想给女主僵尸女王的晶核，挺意外的，我以为他是给自己谋取的，女主吸收完晶核的异能很nice！多方面异能结合的“泡泡攻击”～
总体目前来看是不错的！已催更！大大加油更！
里面提及很多特殊奇怪的异能，像隐身异能，回溯时光倒流异能……感觉挺新颖的
